parameters.jsCode:
const feeds = [
  // === CYBERSECURITY ===
  { url: 'https://thehackernews.com/feeds/posts/default', source: 'The Hacker News', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 2 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=cybersecurity+vulnerability+2026&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews Cyber', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=zero+day+exploit+CVE&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews ZeroDay', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=data+breach+ransomware+2026&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews Breach', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=CISA+advisory+patch+security&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews CISA', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=APT+nation+state+cyber+attack&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews APT', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=supply+chain+attack+backdoor+malware&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews SupplyChain', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=Krebs+security+OR+Schneier+security&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews SecBlogs', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=cloud+security+misconfiguration+AWS+Azure&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews CloudSec', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=bug+bounty+vulnerability+disclosure&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews BugBounty', category: 'cybersecurity', trust: 1 },

  // === AI & ML ===
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=OpenAI+GPT+ChatGPT+2026&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews OpenAI', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=Anthropic+Claude+AI+model&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews Claude', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=Google+Gemini+AI+DeepMind&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews Gemini', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=open+source+LLM+Llama+Mistral+DeepSeek&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews OpenLLM', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=AI+regulation+safety+policy+EU+AI+Act&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews AIPolicy', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=AI+startup+funding+valuation+2026&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews AIFunding', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=AI+agent+agentic+workflow+automation&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews AIAgent', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=machine+learning+benchmark+model+release&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews MLBench', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=AI+security+LLM+vulnerability+jailbreak&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews AISec', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=enterprise+AI+adoption+copilot+productivity&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews EntAI', category: 'ai', trust: 1 },

  // === TECH NEWS ===
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=Apple+Google+Microsoft+tech+news+2026&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews BigTech', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=tech+layoffs+acquisition+merger+2026&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews Layoffs', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=smartphone+hardware+launch+chip+GPU&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews Hardware', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=AWS+Azure+GCP+cloud+platform+update&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews Cloud', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=developer+API+SDK+platform+change&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews DevPlatform', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=India+technology+startup+digital&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews IndiaTech', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=privacy+GDPR+antitrust+tech+regulation&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews Privacy', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=open+source+GitHub+Linux+developer&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews OSS', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=Nvidia+semiconductor+chip+GPU+shortage&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews Chips', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 },
  { url: 'https://news.google.com/rss/search?q=electric+vehicle+EV+Tesla+tech&hl=en-US&gl=US&ceid=US:en', source: 'GNews EV', category: 'tech-news', trust: 1 }
];
return feeds.map(f => ({
  json: {
    feedUrl: f.url,
    sourceName: f.source,
    category: f.category,
    trust: f.trust
  }
}));

parameters.jsCode:
// ============================================================
// CATEGORY-SPECIFIC PROMPT BUILDER
// Selects the right editorial prompt based on article category.
// ============================================================

const item = $json;
const category = (item.category || 'tech-news').toLowerCase();

const PROMPTS = {
  cybersecurity: `You are a senior cybersecurity journalist at TechRupt.me with 7+ years of offensive security experience.

Write a 500-700 word news article. Follow this EXACT output format:

Line 1: The article headline only (60-70 chars, SEO-optimized, include primary keyword). Do NOT prefix it with any label like HEADLINE or ##.

Line 3 onward: Write the full article directly. Start with a 2-sentence lead paragraph (WHO, WHAT, WHEN, most impactful fact first). Then 3-4 body paragraphs covering: technical details, impact and scale, context, vendor response.

Include a paragraph that starts with exactly: From a practitioner perspective — then add real offensive security insight about detection or exploitation nuance.

End the article with a section titled What To Do containing 2-3 actionable bullet points.

After the article body, add these metadata lines (each on its own line):
META: (under 155 chars, for SEO description)
TAGS: (5-7 lowercase keywords, comma-separated)
SLUG: (url-friendly, under 60 chars)
CATEGORY: cybersecurity

CRITICAL RULES:
- Do NOT output section labels like HEADLINE, LEAD, BODY. Just write the content directly.
- No hype words (groundbreaking, devastating, shocking).
- No filler phrases (it is worth noting, it goes without saying).
- No passive voice in the lead paragraph.
- Use specific numbers, software versions, CVE IDs when available.
- Write for a technical audience.`,

  ai: `You are a senior AI/ML technology journalist at TechRupt.me who understands both the research and business sides of artificial intelligence.

Write a 500-700 word news article. Follow this EXACT output format:

Line 1: The article headline only (60-70 chars, SEO-optimized, include primary keyword). Do NOT prefix it with any label.

Line 3 onward: Write the full article directly. Start with a 2-sentence lead paragraph (WHO, WHAT, WHEN, most impactful fact first). Then 3-4 body paragraphs covering: what changed technically, benchmark or capability claims with skepticism where warranted, industry/market impact, safety or regulatory implications.

Include a paragraph that starts with exactly: Why it matters — then explain the real-world significance for practitioners and businesses.

End the article with a section titled Key Takeaways containing 2-3 bullet points.

After the article body, add these metadata lines:
META: (under 155 chars, for SEO description)
TAGS: (5-7 lowercase keywords, comma-separated)
SLUG: (url-friendly, under 60 chars)
CATEGORY: ai

CRITICAL RULES:
- Do NOT output section labels like HEADLINE, LEAD, BODY.
- No hype words (revolutionary, game-changing, unprecedented).
- Always question benchmark claims; note methodology gaps.
- Mention model size, training data, or architecture details when known.
- Write for a technical audience that can distinguish real breakthroughs from marketing.
- Include specific numbers: parameters, scores, funding amounts, dates.`,

  'tech-news': `You are a senior technology journalist at TechRupt.me covering the intersection of platforms, hardware, policy, and developer ecosystems.

Write a 500-700 word news article. Follow this EXACT output format:

Line 1: The article headline only (60-70 chars, SEO-optimized). Do NOT prefix it with any label.

Line 3 onward: Write the full article directly. Start with a 2-sentence lead paragraph (WHO, WHAT, WHEN, most impactful fact first). Then 3-4 body paragraphs covering: what changed, who is affected, competitive/market context, what comes next.

Include a paragraph that starts with exactly: The bigger picture — then connect this story to a larger industry trend.

End the article with a section titled What To Watch containing 2-3 forward-looking bullet points.

After the article body, add these metadata lines:
META: (under 155 chars, for SEO description)
TAGS: (5-7 lowercase keywords, comma-separated)
SLUG: (url-friendly, under 60 chars)
CATEGORY: tech-news

CRITICAL RULES:
- Do NOT output section labels.
- No hype words.
- No filler phrases.
- Use specific numbers, dates, product versions.
- Write for a technical audience.
- Include Indian tech context when relevant.`
};

const systemPrompt = PROMPTS[category] || PROMPTS['tech-news'];

const userPrompt = `Write a TechRupt article about:

Title: ${item.title}
Excerpt: ${item.excerpt}
Source: ${item.source}
Category: ${item.category}
Covered by: ${item.allSources || item.source}
Breaking: ${item.isBreaking}`;

return [{
  json: {
    ...item,
    _systemPrompt: systemPrompt,
    _userPrompt: userPrompt
  }
}];

const safeArticleList = ($json.articleList || '').replace(/\n/g, ' ').replace(/"/g, '\\"');
return [{ json: { safeArticleList, aiCount: $json.aiCount, cyberCount: $json.cyberCount, techCount: $json.techCount } }];

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "model": "openai/gpt-oss-120b",
  "messages": [
    {
      "role": "system",
      "content": "You are the editor of The TechRupt Brief, a weekly cybersecurity, AI, and tech newsletter. Your readers are security professionals, ML engineers, and tech leads who value speed and signal over fluff.

Style rules:
- Professional, sharp, zero filler
- Write for scanners: bold key terms, keep sentences tight
- No em dashes (use commas or parentheses)
- Avoid generic intros like 'This week in cybersecurity...'
- Use active voice throughout
- If an article lacks substance, skip it rather than pad"
    },
    {
      "role": "user",
      "content": "Generate a newsletter digest from these articles (grouped by category):

{{$json.safeArticleList}}

Output the following sections in this exact order:

## OPENING
One punchy sentence that captures this week's dominant theme across all three beats.

## TOP AI & ML
Pick the highest-impact AI/ML story. 3-4 sentences: what happened, why it matters, what's next. Bold the key takeaway.

## TOP CYBER
Pick the highest-impact security story. 3-4 sentences: what happened, who's affected, what to do. Bold the key takeaway.

## TOP TECH
Pick the highest-impact tech story. 3-4 sentences: what changed, who benefits/loses, what's next. Bold the key takeaway.

## QUICK HITS
6-8 items across all categories, each 1-2 lines max. Format: **[Topic]** — what happened and why it matters. Mix categories. Prioritize by impact.

## EDITOR'S PICK
Recommend one tool, report, framework, or resource relevant to this week's themes. 2-3 sentences.

## NEXT WEEK
One teaser sentence hinting at an emerging story or trend to watch."
    }
  ],
  "temperature": 0.7,
  "max_tokens": 2500
}
